name: QRadar-0008 - DNS Tunneling and Covert Channel Detection
description: Detects DNS-based covert channels by identifying hosts generating abnormally high volumes of DNS queries. Used by attackers to exfiltrate data or establish C2 communications through DNS.

detection.log_source_type: DNS Server Logs, Network Flows (QFlow), Firewall Logs
detection.aql: SELECT sourceIP, destinationIP, COUNT(*) as query_count FROM events WHERE destinationPort = 53 GROUP BY sourceIP, destinationIP HAVING COUNT(*) >= 30 LAST 10 MINUTES

response.offense_description: A host is generating anomalous DNS traffic volume. High query rate suggests possible data exfiltration or C2 over DNS.

notes: Pure volume-based DNS detection. Uses only port 53 destination filter for maximum compatibility.
author: Security Team
